message: Body Text chain styles must inherit Normal's first-line indent, not override to 0.
Heading styles must have explicit first_line_indent=1.25.
List numbering: left={left_cm}cm, hanging={hanging_cm}cm, tab at {tab_cm}cm.
Table style must have font_size=12, alignment=JUSTIFY, first_line_indent=0.
Heading style '{style_id}' has italic (<w:i> or <w:iCs>). Strip italic from all heading, caption, title styles.
Caption style has italic (<w:i> or <w:iCs>). Strip italic from caption style.
Введение не умещается на одной странице (следующий заголовок на странице {page}). Сократи текст введения.
